title: D3fault Client
description: A Fan Client for the YouTuber and Crystal PvPer KingD3fault
body:
# D3fault Client!

A FANMADE CLIENT FOR KINGD3FAULT

**FEATURES:**
- ALL OF KINGD3FAULT'S MODS (DOESN'T HAVE MARLOW'S CRYSTAL OPTIMIZER, YOU HAVE TO MANUALLY INSTALL IT FROM HER SERVER)
- PRELOADED CRYSTAL PVP TEXTUREPACKS'
- KINGD3FAULT THEMED MENU
- PRELOADED SERVERS

AND MORE!
